settings.hero_subheading: Our mission: grow extraordinary carnivorous plants for South African collectors.
settings.split_text:
Founded in the Western Cape, our nursery pairs macro photography with field-tested culture protocols. Every genus we sell is backed by integrated care guidance — light, water, soil, and dormancy notes written for Southern Hemisphere seasons.

We propagate in-house, acclimate stock before shipping, and prioritise living plants that arrive ready for your bench or terrarium.

settings.title: Quality control
settings.text: Every plant is inspected for pests, vigour, and true-to-name characteristics before it is listed.

settings.title: Specialized soil
settings.text: We blend peat, perlite, and mineral components matched to each genus — never generic potting mix.

settings.title: Expert care
settings.text: Integrated genus guides, difficulty ratings, and seasonal dormancy notes ship with every order.
